---
title: "Ghost Ships of Ireland's Coast"
subtitle: "Named wrecks drift across a living sea of Irish maritime records"
author: "Deepali Kank"
date: 2026-06-30
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: false
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

# Packages ---------------------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(jsonlite)

# Data -------------------------------------------------------------------

data_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-06-30/wreck_inventory.csv"

wrecks <- readr::read_csv(data_url, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    wreck_name = str_squish(wreck_name),
    ship_name = str_to_title(wreck_name),
    classification = na_if(str_squish(classification), ""),
    place_of_loss = na_if(str_squish(place_of_loss), ""),
    description = na_if(str_squish(description), "")
  )

first_or <- function(x, default) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) default else x[[1]]
}

top_or <- function(x, default) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) default else names(sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE))[[1]]
}

ship_info <- wrecks |>
  filter(!is.na(wreck_name), wreck_name != "", !str_to_lower(wreck_name) %in% c("unknown", "unnamed")) |>
  arrange(ship_name, year) |>
  summarise(
    name = first(ship_name),
    records = n(),
    year_min = suppressWarnings(min(year, na.rm = TRUE)),
    year_max = suppressWarnings(max(year, na.rm = TRUE)),
    classification = top_or(classification, "Unknown"),
    place = first_or(place_of_loss, "Location not listed"),
    description = first_or(description, "No description available."),
    wreck_no = str_c(head(na.omit(wreck_no), 3), collapse = ", "),
    .by = ship_name
  ) |>
  mutate(
    year_min = if_else(is.infinite(year_min), NA_integer_, as.integer(year_min)),
    year_max = if_else(is.infinite(year_max), NA_integer_, as.integer(year_max)),
    year_span = case_when(
      is.na(year_min) & is.na(year_max) ~ "Year unknown",
      year_min == year_max ~ as.character(year_min),
      TRUE ~ str_c(year_min, "–", year_max)
    ),
    description = str_trunc(description, 260),
    wreck_no = na_if(wreck_no, "")
  ) |>
  arrange(name)

# Miscs ------------------------------------------------------------------

ship_info_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(ship_info, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")
name_count <- nrow(ship_info)
record_count <- nrow(wrecks)
```

```{=html}
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,500;0,600;1,500;1,600&family=Inter:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap');

  html, body {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #fff;
  }

  body .page-columns,
  body .page-full,
  body main,
  body .content,
  body .column-body,
  body .column-page,
  body .column-screen {
    display: block !important;
    width: 100vw !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
  }

  .quarto-title-block,
  #title-block-header,
  .figure-caption,
  p:empty {
    display: none !important;
  }

  #wreck-wave-stage {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, #fff 0%, #f4f4f4 48%, #e7e7e7 100%);
    color: #000;
  }

  #wreck-wave-canvas {
    display: block;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    background: transparent;
    cursor: crosshair;
  }

  #wreck-info-panel {
    position: fixed;
    top: 148px;
    right: 36px;
    transform: translateY(-12px);
    width: min(620px, calc(100vw - 72px));
    max-height: none;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 18px 22px;
    border-radius: 22px;
    color: #000;
    background: linear-gradient(155deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96), rgba(238, 238, 238, 0.92));
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.26);
    box-shadow: 0 28px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    font-family: "Inter", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease;
  }

  #wreck-info-panel.is-visible {
    opacity: 1;
    pointer-events: auto;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  #wreck-info-panel .eyebrow {
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #333;
  }

  #wreck-info-panel h2 {
    margin: 0 0 10px;
    font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, serif;
    font-size: clamp(30px, 3.4vw, 44px);
    line-height: 0.92;
    color: #000;
  }

  #wreck-info-panel dl {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr;
    gap: 8px 14px;
    margin: 0 0 10px;
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  #wreck-info-panel dt { color: #555; }
  #wreck-info-panel dd { margin: 0; color: #000; }

  #wreck-info-panel .description {
    display: -webkit-box;
    margin: 10px 0 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
    font: 500 15px/1.34 "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, serif;
    color: #222;
  }

  #wreck-info-panel button {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px;
    right: 12px;
    border: 0;
    color: #000;
    background: transparent;
    font-size: 24px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
</style>

<div id="wreck-wave-stage">
  <canvas id="wreck-wave-canvas"></canvas>
  <aside id="wreck-info-panel" aria-live="polite">
    <button id="wreck-info-close" type="button" aria-label="Close ship details">×</button>
    <p class="eyebrow">Click a ship name</p>
    <h2>Ship details</h2>
    <dl>
      <dt>Records</dt><dd>—</dd>
      <dt>Years</dt><dd>—</dd>
      <dt>Type</dt><dd>—</dd>
      <dt>Place</dt><dd>—</dd>
    </dl>
    <p class="description">Choose a name drifting through the waves to surface its inventory notes.</p>
  </aside>
</div>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7"></script>
```

```{r}
#| label: animated-waves
#| results: asis

cat(
  "<script>\n",
  "const shipInfo = ", ship_info_json, ";\n",
  "const shipNames = shipInfo.map(d => d.name);\n",
  "const nameCount = ", name_count, ";\n",
  "const recordCount = ", record_count, ";\n",
  "</script>\n",
  sep = ""
)
```

```{=html}
<script>
(() => {
  const canvas = document.getElementById("wreck-wave-canvas");
  const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
  const stage = document.getElementById("wreck-wave-stage");
  const panel = document.getElementById("wreck-info-panel");
  const closePanel = document.getElementById("wreck-info-close");
  const prefersReduced = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches;

  const state = {
    width: 0,
    height: 0,
    dpr: 1,
    names: [],
    rows: [],
    hits: [],
    ship: { x: 0, y: 0, speed: 18, phase: 0 }
  };

  const fontStack = "'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif";
  const uiFont = "Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Avenir Next', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif";
  const palette = {
    skyTop: "#ffffff",
    skyBottom: "#e7e7e7",
    seaLine: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22)",
    waveLine: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.13)",
    text: "#000000",
    title: "#000000",
    muted: "#333333",
    ship: "#000000",
    shipStroke: "#ffffff"
  };
  const infoByName = new Map(shipInfo.map(d => [d.name, d]));

  function resize() {
    state.dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
    state.width = window.innerWidth;
    state.height = window.innerHeight;
    canvas.width = Math.floor(state.width * state.dpr);
    canvas.height = Math.floor(state.height * state.dpr);
    canvas.style.width = `${state.width}px`;
    canvas.style.height = `${state.height}px`;
    ctx.setTransform(state.dpr, 0, 0, state.dpr, 0, 0);
    prepareNames();
  }

  function prepareNames() {
    const w = state.width;
    const h = state.height;
    const compactWave = Math.max(1, Math.min(1.85, 1050 / w));
    const topSea = Math.max(282, h * 0.39);
    const bottomPad = Math.max(2, h * 0.012);
    const rowGap = Math.max(34, Math.min(46, h / 17));
    const rowCount = Math.max(7, Math.floor((h - topSea - bottomPad) / rowGap));
    const fontSize = Math.max(15, Math.min(24, w / 58));
    const gap = Math.max(28, fontSize * 1.75);

    state.rows = d3.range(rowCount).map(row => ({
      y: topSea + row * rowGap,
      phase: row * 0.78,
      amp: (14 + (row % 4) * 4.5) * compactWave,
      freq: (0.0078 + (row % 5) * 0.0017) * compactWave,
      speed: 34 + (row % 6) * 3,
      fontSize,
      names: [],
      offsets: [],
      totalWidth: 0
    }));

    shipNames.forEach((name, i) => {
      const row = state.rows[i % rowCount];
      const size = fontSize + (i % 29 === 0 ? 3 : 0);
      ctx.font = `italic ${size}px ${fontStack}`;
      const width = ctx.measureText(name).width + gap;
      row.names.push({ name, info: infoByName.get(name), width, size });
      row.totalWidth += width;
    });

    state.rows.forEach((row, rowIndex) => {
      let x = 0;
      row.names.forEach(item => {
        row.offsets.push(x);
        x += item.width;
      });
      row.start = (row.totalWidth * (rowIndex * 0.173 + 0.07)) % row.totalWidth;
    });

    state.ship.x = w * 0.62;
    state.ship.y = topSea - Math.max(82, h * 0.112);
    state.ship.speed = Math.max(18, w / 58);
  }

  function drawShip(cx, cy, scale, t) {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(cx, cy + Math.sin(t * 1.8) * 7);
    ctx.rotate(Math.sin(t * 1.25) * 0.035);
    ctx.scale(scale, scale);
    ctx.fillStyle = palette.ship;
    ctx.strokeStyle = palette.shipStroke;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2.4;
    ctx.lineCap = "round";
    ctx.lineJoin = "round";

    // Hull with raised bow and stern, drawn as a side-view vessel.
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(-78, 19);
    ctx.bezierCurveTo(-58, 34, -31, 42, 14, 41);
    ctx.bezierCurveTo(58, 40, 83, 27, 93, 7);
    ctx.lineTo(69, 55);
    ctx.bezierCurveTo(33, 69, -35, 67, -68, 51);
    ctx.bezierCurveTo(-80, 40, -86, 28, -78, 19);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = palette.shipStroke;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(-66, 34);
    ctx.bezierCurveTo(-25, 52, 38, 54, 74, 36);
    ctx.stroke();

    // Deckhouse and bridge.
    ctx.fillStyle = palette.ship;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.rect(-24, -8, 58, 26);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(-10, -30);
    ctx.lineTo(29, -30);
    ctx.lineTo(42, -8);
    ctx.lineTo(-24, -8);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.fillStyle = palette.shipStroke;
    for (let x = -13; x <= 24; x += 18) {
      ctx.fillRect(x, -22, 10, 7);
    }
    ctx.fillRect(-14, 1, 10, 8);
    ctx.fillRect(6, 1, 10, 8);
    ctx.fillRect(26, 1, 10, 8);

    // Mast, rigging, funnel, and railings make the silhouette read as a ship.
    ctx.strokeStyle = palette.ship;
    ctx.lineWidth = 4;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, -83);
    ctx.lineTo(0, -30);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.lineWidth = 1.7;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, -75);
    ctx.lineTo(-52, 17);
    ctx.moveTo(0, -69);
    ctx.lineTo(74, 13);
    ctx.moveTo(-66, 17);
    ctx.lineTo(78, 17);
    ctx.moveTo(-58, 13);
    ctx.lineTo(-58, 28);
    ctx.moveTo(-36, 13);
    ctx.lineTo(-36, 29);
    ctx.moveTo(51, 13);
    ctx.lineTo(51, 27);
    ctx.moveTo(70, 12);
    ctx.lineTo(70, 22);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.fillStyle = palette.ship;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.rect(42, -22, 15, 32);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.34)";
    ctx.lineWidth = 2.2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(-96, 62);
    ctx.bezierCurveTo(-58, 72, 50, 74, 102, 59);
    ctx.moveTo(-72, 73);
    ctx.bezierCurveTo(-36, 82, 31, 82, 68, 72);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawHeader(t) {
    const w = state.width;
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = palette.title;
    ctx.textAlign = "center";
    ctx.textBaseline = "alphabetic";
    ctx.font = `800 ${Math.max(34, Math.min(64, w / 18))}px ${uiFont}`;
    ctx.shadowColor = "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85)";
    ctx.shadowBlur = 16;
    ctx.fillText("Ghost Ships of Ireland's Coast", w / 2, Math.max(62, state.height * 0.08));
    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    ctx.font = `400 ${Math.max(14, Math.min(22, w / 64))}px ${uiFont}`;
    ctx.fillStyle = palette.muted;
    ctx.fillText(`${d3.format(",")(nameCount)} named wrecks drifting through ${d3.format(",")(recordCount)} Irish maritime records`, w / 2, Math.max(90, state.height * 0.08 + 32));
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawFrame(elapsed) {
    const t = elapsed / 1000;
    const w = state.width;
    const h = state.height;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
    const grd = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h);
    grd.addColorStop(0, palette.skyTop);
    grd.addColorStop(0.38, "#f4f4f4");
    grd.addColorStop(1, palette.skyBottom);
    ctx.fillStyle = grd;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

    // A faint old-chart vignette for a shipwreck-site atmosphere.
    const fog = ctx.createRadialGradient(w * 0.5, h * 0.15, 20, w * 0.5, h * 0.2, Math.max(w, h) * 0.8);
    fog.addColorStop(0, "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)");
    fog.addColorStop(1, "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)");
    ctx.fillStyle = fog;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

    drawHeader(t);

    const seaTop = state.rows.length ? state.rows[0].y - 26 : h * 0.28;
    ctx.strokeStyle = palette.seaLine;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    for (let x = 0; x <= w; x += 12) {
      const y = seaTop + Math.sin(x * 0.014 + t * 1.6) * 4;
      if (x === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
      else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    }
    ctx.stroke();

    const shipScale = Math.max(0.76, Math.min(1.2, w / 1050));
    const shipWrap = w + 220;
    const shipX = ((state.ship.x - t * state.ship.speed + 140) % shipWrap + shipWrap) % shipWrap - 110;

    function waveY(row, x, t) {
      return row.y + Math.sin(x * row.freq + t * 1.15 + row.phase) * row.amp;
    }

    // Draw subtle wave paths first; the names ride exactly on these paths.
    ctx.strokeStyle = palette.waveLine;
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.75;
    for (const row of state.rows) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      for (let x = -20; x <= w + 20; x += 10) {
        const y = waveY(row, x, t);
        if (x === -20) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
        else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
      }
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    ctx.textAlign = "left";
    ctx.textBaseline = "middle";
    ctx.fillStyle = palette.text;
    state.hits = [];
    for (const row of state.rows) {
      const total = row.totalWidth;
      const offset = -((t * row.speed + row.start) % total);
      row.names.forEach((item, i) => {
        let x = offset + row.offsets[i];
        while (x < -item.width) x += total;
        while (x > w + item.width) x -= total;
        if (x < -item.width || x > w + item.width) return;
        const y = waveY(row, x, t);
        const slope = Math.cos(x * row.freq + t * 1.15 + row.phase) * row.amp * row.freq;
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(x, y);
        ctx.rotate(Math.atan(slope));
        ctx.font = `italic ${item.size}px ${fontStack}`;
        ctx.fillStyle = palette.text;
        ctx.fillText(item.name, 0, 0);
        state.hits.push({
          name: item.name,
          info: item.info,
          x,
          y,
          width: item.width,
          height: item.size * 1.5
        });
        ctx.restore();
      });
    }

    drawShip(shipX, state.ship.y, shipScale, t);

    if (!prefersReduced) requestAnimationFrame(drawFrame);
  }

  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value ?? "—")
      .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
      .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
      .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
      .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
      .replaceAll("'", "&#039;");
  }

  function showInfo(info) {
    if (!info) return;
    panel.innerHTML = `
      <button id="wreck-info-close" type="button" aria-label="Close ship details">×</button>
      <p class="eyebrow">Wreck inventory</p>
      <h2>${escapeHtml(info.name)}</h2>
      <dl>
        <dt>Records</dt><dd>${escapeHtml(d3.format(",")(info.records || 0))}</dd>
        <dt>Years</dt><dd>${escapeHtml(info.year_span || "Year unknown")}</dd>
        <dt>Type</dt><dd>${escapeHtml(info.classification || "Unknown")}</dd>
        <dt>Place</dt><dd>${escapeHtml(info.place || "Location not listed")}</dd>
        ${info.wreck_no ? `<dt>IDs</dt><dd>${escapeHtml(info.wreck_no)}</dd>` : ""}
      </dl>
      <p class="description">${escapeHtml(info.description || "No description available.")}</p>
    `;
    panel.classList.add("is-visible");
    panel.querySelector("button").addEventListener("click", () => panel.classList.remove("is-visible"));
  }

  function pickName(event) {
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const px = event.clientX - rect.left;
    const py = event.clientY - rect.top;
    let best = null;
    let bestDistance = Infinity;
    for (const hit of state.hits) {
      const withinX = px >= hit.x - 6 && px <= hit.x + hit.width + 6;
      const withinY = py >= hit.y - hit.height && py <= hit.y + hit.height;
      if (!withinX || !withinY) continue;
      const dx = Math.max(hit.x - px, 0, px - (hit.x + hit.width));
      const dy = Math.abs(py - hit.y);
      const distance = dx * dx + dy * dy;
      if (distance < bestDistance) {
        best = hit;
        bestDistance = distance;
      }
    }
    if (best) showInfo(best.info);
  }

  canvas.addEventListener("click", pickName);
  canvas.addEventListener("mousemove", event => {
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const px = event.clientX - rect.left;
    const py = event.clientY - rect.top;
    const hovering = state.hits.some(hit =>
      px >= hit.x - 6 && px <= hit.x + hit.width + 6 &&
      py >= hit.y - hit.height && py <= hit.y + hit.height
    );
    canvas.style.cursor = hovering ? "pointer" : "crosshair";
  });
  closePanel.addEventListener("click", () => panel.classList.remove("is-visible"));

  window.addEventListener("resize", resize);
  resize();
  requestAnimationFrame(drawFrame);
})();
</script>
```
